g.title: n_trustview
g.text: “Issuer keys + status digests recorded as events for offline verification.”

g.title: n_event_producers
g.text: “Users/agents create DATA; authorities issue GRANT/REVOKE; all signed.”

g.title: n_p2p_gossip
g.text: “Anti‑entropy; dedup; causal parent fetching; secure transport.”

g.title: n_signed_log
g.text: “Append‑only events with parent links; op_id = H(domain ∥ CBOR(header)).”

g.title: n_auth_epochs
g.text: “Grants + revokes + status ⇒ time‑bounded intervals per subject & scope.”

g.title: n_deny_wins_gate
g.text: “Apply if authorized @ event time; else skip.”

g.title: n_det_replay
g.text: “Scan total order; call gate; apply DATA ops only when permitted.”

g.title: n_crdt_layer
g.text: “MVReg / OR‑Set; deterministic merges under the same order.”

g.title: n_materialized_state
g.text: “Final, policy‑correct view; byte‑identical for same events.”

g.title: n_confidentiality
g.text: “Tag/version encryption; key rotation at revocation; consistent redaction.”

g.title: n_legend
g.text: “Convergence • Policy‑Safety • Determinism • Audit Integrity • Forward Secrecy”
